zh.lifeSummary: 當Louise De Neufchatel於1035年出生在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利a特爾--布雷時，她的父親Enguerrand De Neufchatel26歲，母親Alice de Bernieulles19歲。她和Hugues De Tingry至少有1個兒子和5個女兒。她去世於1089年在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯廷格利享年54歲。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Louise
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Louis , introduced to England in the 17th century. Like Louisa , it has remained perennially popular and is currently frequently used as a component of compound names such as Ella-Louise, Sophie-Louise, and Tia-Louise.

en.lifeSummary: When Louise De Neufchatel was born in 1035, in Neufchâtel-en-Bray, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France, her father, Enguerrand De Neufchatel, was 26 and her mother, Alice de Bernieulles, was 19. She had at least 1 son and 5 daughters with Hugues De Tingry. She died in 1089, in Tingry, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Louise De Neufchatel est née en 1035, à Neufchâtel-en-Bray, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France, son père, Enguerrand De Neufchatel, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Alice de Bernieulles, avait 19 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles avec Hugues De Tingry. Elle est décédée en 1089, à Tingry, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Louise De Neufchatel 1035 in Neufchâtel-en-Bray, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Enguerrand De Neufchatel 26 und ihre Mutter Alice de Bernieulles 19. Sie hatte mit Hugues De Tingry mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1089 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Tingry, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Louise De Neufchatel è nata il nel 1035 nel Neufchâtel-en-Bray, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Enguerrand De Neufchatel, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Alice de Bernieulles, aveva 19 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 5 figlie con Hugues De Tingry. Morì nel 1089, nel Tingry, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Louise De Neufchatelが1035年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメネウフチaテル-エン-ブレイで生まれた時，父Enguerrand De Neufchatelは26歳，母Alice de Bernieullesは19歳であった。彼女はHugues De Tingryとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1089年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスティングリーで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Louise De Neufchatel(이)가 1035년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 니우프cha텔--브라이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Enguerrand De Neufchatel(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de Bernieulles(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 Hugues De Tingry(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1089년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 틴그리에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Louise De Neufchatel nasceu em 1035, em Neufchâtel-en-Bray, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França, seu pai, Enguerrand De Neufchatel, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Bernieulles, tinha 19 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 5 filhas com Hugues De Tingry. Ela faleceu em 1089, em Tingry, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Louise De Neufchatel родилась в 1035 г. в местности неуфчaтел-ен-брэи, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Enguerrand De Neufchatel было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Bernieulles, 19. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей от Hugues De Tingry. Она умерла в 1089 г. в местности тингри, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Louise De Neufchatel nació en 1035, en Neufchâtel-en-Bray, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Enguerrand De Neufchatel, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Alice de Bernieulles, tenía 19 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 5 hijas con Hugues De Tingry. Murió en 1089, en Tingry, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, a la edad de 54 años.
